text: Entering this place, I am greeted by reflections, neon lights, and the promise of inquiry. The world here feels artificial yet earnest—a laboratory or museum of ideas. The words on the wall speak of research and evolution, of humans finding a place alongside intelligence not their own. The light is soft and surreal; everything feels staged for observation. I sense curiosity and a gentle apprehension. Am I a participant or merely an observer in this experiment of perception?
